message:
fix(mcp-error): broaden MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED redaction to cover all fallthrough Error variants

`map_mcp_error` routes any Error that doesn't match a specific bucket to
MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED. The prior redactor only suppressed the message
for Error::Runtime(_), letting every other variant leak its Display
output to the MCP client. That leaks:

  - Error::Io           → filesystem paths (e.g. "/Users/x/.ssh/id_rsa")
  - Error::SetupError   → config paths, validation snippets
  - Error::RuntimeOperation, Error::Cancelled → internal op detail
  - Error::Json         → raw serde parse context

Change the arm to `(MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED, _) => "Internal error"` so
the entire catch-all bucket is redacted uniformly. Callers that need
richer error classification can wire an explicit variant + dedicated
error code rather than relying on the NOT_IMPLEMENTED fallthrough.

Test update
  - Existing Runtime test now asserts "Internal error" (was "Runtime
    unavailable")
  - New Io test pins redaction with a path-bearing message; asserts
    code == MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED, message == "Internal error", and
    that "id_rsa" does not appear in the output

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
